title: Red5 Pro Restream Provision
description: Schema representing a restreaming provision that configures the Red5 Pro server to forward a live stream to one or more external RTMP, RTMPS, SRT, or Zixi destinations.

streamName.description: Name of the source live stream to retransmit

appName.description: Red5 Pro application scope containing the source stream

type.description: Restreaming mode: push sends to external destinations, pull ingests from external sources

status.description: Current operational status of this restream provision

destinations.description: External RTMP/RTMPS destinations to push the stream to (used for push type)

Destination.description: An external destination endpoint for RTMP push restreaming

url.description: RTMP or RTMPS ingest URL of the destination platform

streamKey.description: Stream key provided by the destination platform

label.description: Human-readable label for this destination (e.g., YouTube, Facebook)

enabled.description: Whether this destination is currently active

Source.description: External RTMP source configuration for pull restreaming

url.description: RTMP URL of the external source to pull from

streamKey.description: Stream key at the source if required for authentication

filePath.description: Server filesystem path to the FLV or MP4 file to restream

format.description: File format of the source file

loop.description: Whether to loop the file when playback reaches the end

ReconnectConfig.description: Automatic reconnection settings for a restream provision

enabled.description: Whether to automatically reconnect if the connection is lost

maxAttempts.description: Maximum number of reconnection attempts before giving up

delayMs.description: Delay in milliseconds between reconnection attempts
